news.headline: Binance launches Earn Wednesday with exclusive crypto offers like ETH and SOL staking, Simple Earn, and Dual Investment.
news.summary: Binance has launched Earn Wednesday, a new initiative featuring exclusive crypto investment opportunities for a limited time. Investors can now participate in staking for popular cryptocurrencies like Ethereum (ETH) and Solana (SOL), as well as explore Simple Earn and Dual Investment products. This new program aims to provide users with diverse options to grow their digital assets and maximize returns.

news.headline: Appian appoints Mark Dorsey as Chief Revenue Officer, bringing over 25 years of sales leadership experience.
news.summary: Experienced executive Mark Dorsey has joined leading process automation company Appian (Nasdaq: APPN) as the new Chief Revenue Officer. With over 25 years of strategic sales leadership under his belt, Dorsey is set to oversee the company's worldwide operations. The appointment was made public on October 23, 2024, solidifying Appian's commitment to driving growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: trivago partners with Jürgen Klopp for global marketing campaign, showcasing authenticity and credibility.
news.summary: In Düsseldorf, Germany on October 23, 2024, trivago, a top global hotel search platform, revealed a new partnership with famed soccer coach Jürgen Klopp. Klopp will be the focal point of trivago's upcoming worldwide marketing initiative, showcasing a seamless match between his genuine, upbeat persona and trivago's core values.

news.headline: Details of debtors at Realkredit Danmark A/S unveiled, figures to be revealed shortly.
46th edition of SIGEP sold out, rebranded as Sigep World, expanding to 138,000 sqm with 3,000 buyers from 90 countries.
news.summary: The 46th annual SIGEP has transformed into Sigep World - The World Expo for Foodservice Excellence and has expanded to include two additional halls, now totaling 138,000 square meters. All stands have been successfully sold out, and there has been a significant boost in the internationalization strategy, with an anticipated attendance of 3,000 buyers from more than 90 countries. This event is currently taking place in RIMINI, Italy.

news.headline: Global usage of mobile internet is on the rise, with 43% of the population, or 3.45 billion people, still lacking access.
news.summary: As of October 23, 2024, in London, a recent report titled 'State of Mobile Internet Connectivity 2024' from GSMA reveals that despite the advantages of mobile connectivity, 43% of the world's population, totaling 3.45 billion individuals, remain without access to mobile internet services. This highlights the untapped potential and challenges in expanding mobile internet usage globally.

news.headline: Asia braces for insolvency increase as China's economy slows, Atradius survey shows. Companies worried about rising insolvencies affecting B2B trade.
news.summary: In Amsterdam on October 23, 2024, the latest Atradius Payment Practices Barometer survey highlighted Asia's apprehension about increasing insolvencies, potentially impacting B2B credit trade. Companies in the region are worried about the future, with a rising number expressing concerns. This survey serves as a vital insight into the challenges faced by businesses in Asia, emphasizing the uncertainty surrounding insolvencies and their influence on credit trading within the region.

news.headline: Threads Software Ltd releases call transcription module for FreePBX, world's top open-source telephony software.
news.summary: A UK company, Threads Software Ltd, has launched a call transcription module for the FreePBX, a cloud-based telephone system. FreePBX, based on the open-source Asterisk kernel, is a widely used telephony software globally. Canadian telephony giant Sangoma has adopted FreePBX, which serves as the foundation for various proprietary telephony systems. Threads Intelligent Message Hub, a Cloud-based dashboard, has the capability to capture, transcribe, and manage messages efficiently. This development aims to enhance the functionality of FreePBX for users, with the potential to streamline communication processes.

news.headline: Thredd's free guide "Launching in America: A guide to issuing via BIN sponsorship" offers insights for global payments executives on entering the U.S. market. Check it out!
news.summary: A prominent global payments processor, Thredd, based in London, has recently published a complimentary guide titled "Launching in America: A Guide to Issuing via BIN Sponsorship." This report is specifically designed for programme managers and fintech companies aiming to enter the American payments market. Packed with crucial information and expert opinions on the hurdles and prerequisites encountered by international businesses, the guide is essential for global payments executives and any entity planning to introduce their products or services in the US market. The report focuses on providing insights into the challenges and requirements faced by foreign entities seeking to expand into America. This guide serves as a valuable resource for those considering venturing into the American payments industry.

news.headline: FICO UK Credit Card Market Rep: Aug 2024 shows higher missed payments than 2023. Encouraging direct debit can help. Spending on credit cards increased to £835.
news.summary: In August 2024, the FICO UK Credit Card Market Report revealed that spending on credit cards rose to £835, following seasonal trends in payments to balance. However, compared to the same period in 2023, missed payments have notably increased. To align with the Consumer Duty, lenders are advised to promote the use of direct debit for payments among cardholders and establish proactive customer communication strategies for addressing delinquencies.

news.headline: Investor Day hosted by WithSecure scheduled for November 22, 2024. #finance #investing #events
Huawei's Global Optical Summit at GITEX GLOBAL 2024 in Dubai attracted over 300 industry experts, focused on accelerating F5G-A and amplifying intelligence.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on October 23, 2024, the Huawei Global Optical Summit took place as a part of GITEX GLOBAL 2024. The summit, themed "Accelerate F5G-A, Amplify Intelligence", gathered over 300 attendees including industry experts, customers, and partners from various nations.

news.headline: German Foreign Minister: Israel has succeeded in considerably weakening Hezbollah, the task now is to find a viable diplomatic solution.
Aspo Plc to release interim report for Jan-Sep 2024 on Oct 29, 2024 at 8:00 am Finnish time.
news.summary: Aspo Plc is set to release its interim report for the period of January to September 2024 on Tuesday, October 29, 2024, at around 8:00 a.m. local time. This update follows the company's announcement on October 23, 2024, at 10:45 a.m. about the forthcoming publication of its financial report.

news.headline: European Energy A/S has completed the expiration of tender offer for existing bonds (2021/2025) and (2022/2026) with restrictions in place.
news.summary: This information is not meant to be disclosed, published, or distributed, either directly or indirectly, in the United States. Similarly, it is not intended for release, publication, or distribution, directly or indirectly, to any individual in any jurisdiction where such actions are restricted by applicable laws or regulations.

news.headline: GOAT token trading now available on BitMEX's spot platform. Users can deposit, buy, and trade AI meme coin against USDT.
news.summary: BitMEX recently introduced trading for the GOAT token on its spot platform. Users can now deposit, purchase, and trade the AI meme coin against USDT.

news.headline: Central bank begins discussion on potential interest rate reduction below neutral level.
Roche CEO optimistic about company’s direction, momentum.
SEC Chair Gary Gensler celebrates Bitcoin's 16th anniversary ahead of whitepaper's. Nakamoto wrote it in 2008.
news.summary: SEC Chair Gary Gensler recently acknowledged Bitcoin's upcoming 16th anniversary of its white paper being published by creator Satoshi Nakamoto. Gensler expressed his well wishes for the cryptocurrency, referring to it as "Happy Sweet Sixteen." The white paper, released on October 31, 2008, is considered a critical document in the realm of cryptocurrency and blockchain technology. Gensler's comments were made during an interview with Bloomberg Technology, where he highlighted the significance of Bitcoin's milestone.

news.headline: Apple CEO pledges increased investment in China during meeting with technology leader.
Invest in Indian stocks during market drop, UBS recommends for increased asset allocation, reports Bloomberg.
news.summary: According to a report by UBS Global Wealth Management, investors are advised to "buy the dip" in Indian stocks as the market experiences a downturn. The report suggests increasing asset allocations to take advantage of this opportunity. This advice comes amidst a fluctuating market condition, where potential gains could be achieved through strategic investments in Indian stocks. It is recommended that investors consider restructuring their portfolios to capitalize on the current situation.

news.headline: Binance integrates USDC on zkSync Era Network, enabling deposits and withdrawals for users.
news.summary: Binance recently disclosed that they have effectively incorporated USDC into the zkSync Era network. This integration enables users to deposit and withdraw the stablecoin.

news.headline: NOVOSENSE meets rising demand for high-performance automotive sensors in a global market as safety and comfort standards increase.
news.summary: In Shanghai on October 23, 2024, the demand for high-performance sensors is increasing due to the advancement of automobile safety and comfort standards. NOVOSENSE Microelectronics, a leading global supplier of automotive chips, provides a wide range of automotive-grade sensor products. Their portfolio includes various sensor products tailored for the automotive sector, as the market continues to grow.

news.headline: Adam Price to speak on GalaChain's decentralization at LF Trust Summit, showcasing Hyperledger Fabric innovations. Exclusive event for Linux Foundation members.
news.summary: Adam Price will be presenting GalaChain's initiatives for decentralization during the LF Decentralized Trust Member Summit. He will showcase advancements in Hyperledger Fabric. This event is restricted to Linux Foundation members.

news.headline: Binance debuts FDUSD Locked Products with 16.2% APR. Promotion valid from Oct 23 to Nov 5, 2024. Act fast!
news.summary: Binance has launched FDUSD Fixed Rate Locked Products with a 16.2% Annual Percentage Rate (APR) promotion available from October 23 until November 5, 2024. This offer operates on a first-come, first-served system, providing users with an opportunity to benefit from the promotional APR within the specified timeframe.

news.headline: Binance to back Viction (VIC) upgrade: hard fork on Oct 29, 2024. Deposits and withdrawals to be paused.
news.summary: Binance has revealed its plans to back Viction (VIC) network's upcoming upgrade and hard fork. This move will lead to a temporary halt in deposits and withdrawals on Binance starting from October 29, 2024.

news.headline: AppFactor opens Early Access for GenAI-driven app refactoring platform, automating code improvements.
news.summary: In London, a company named AppFactor has introduced an early access program for their GenAI-driven platform designed for application refactoring. This platform aims to automate the process of enhancing and maintaining code on a large scale for enterprises.

news.headline: Famous investor suggests Bitcoin in the face of rising inflation concerns.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week, with a total of 15,000 new cases reported. The country also saw a rise in the death toll, with 500 new deaths recorded. Health officials have expressed concern over the spike in cases and are urging the public to follow safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus. The total number of confirmed cases now stands at 200,000, with the death toll reaching 5,000.Authorities are closely monitoring the situation and are considering implementing stricter measures to control the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Buterin criticizes Saylor's support for big bank BTC custody, calling it 'insane'. Regulatory capture approach warned against.
news.summary: Michael Saylor seems to advocate for a regulatory capture strategy to safeguard cryptocurrencies, according to Vitalik Buterin. Buterin noted that this approach is not in line with the main purpose of regulatory protection for cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: US Rep. Hill expects crypto bills to advance in 'lame duck' Congress before disbanding; 2 bills in focus.
news.summary: Congressman French Hill believes that two cryptocurrency regulation bills in the US could advance before the current Congress dissolves.

news.headline: Polymarket targets US users amid shift in election odds, with Trump now at 63.7% chances to win presidency despite conflicting polls.
news.summary: According to Polymarket, there is a 63.7% chance of Donald Trump winning the upcoming US presidential election. However, voter polls paint a different picture regarding the likelihood of his victory.

news.headline: Fujitsu launches Fujitsu Kozuchi AI Agent that can collaborate and autonomously engage in high-level tasks worldwide.
news.summary: In Kawasaki, Japan, on October 23, 2024, Fujitsu introduced the Fujitsu Kozuchi AI Agent to the global market. This AI service is designed to participate in advanced tasks independently and in teamwork settings. The AI agents are expected to deliver efficient outcomes as part of the team.

news.headline: Highest court dismisses Byju's settlement, setting path for insolvency. #legalnews #Byju #insolvency
Soracom presents IoT connected car proof of concept at AECC conference, demonstrating secure network for OEM cloud.
news.summary: In Berlin and Seattle, Soracom is set to display a proof of concept featuring a cutting-edge network architecture for connected vehicles. This aims to facilitate secure connections between cars and their Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) cloud platform.

news.headline: Dante Omics awarded ISO 9001 certification for Italian lab, providing NGS services. Leading in genomics AI.
news.summary: A leading genomics-driven artificial intelligence solutions provider, Dante Omics, has proudly revealed that its state-of-the-art laboratory located in Italy has attained the prestigious ISO 9001:2015 certification for delivering genomic Next Generation Sequencing, analysis, and interpretation services. The certification was granted to Dante Labs Srl. This milestone underscores the company's dedication to upholding top-notch standards.

news.headline: Lithium carbonate produced from Permian Basin oilfield brine by Volt Lithium, a major breakthrough in renewable energy.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the economy grew by 6.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of a 6.3% growth. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in the past year. These positive results have been attributed to the increase in consumer spending and a boost in exports. On the downside, inflation rose by 2.3% in the same period, leading to concerns about rising prices. Despite this, analysts remain optimistic about the overall economic outlook for the upcoming months.

news.headline: Treblle introduces AI-enhanced API platform Treblle 3.0 for API transformation. Offers new features to support API initiatives.
news.summary: In London, Treblle, a prominent API observability company, has launched Treblle 3.0, an advanced API intelligence platform powered by AI. This latest version emphasizes API transformation and artificial intelligence, offering a range of new features to support API projects. Treblle 3.0 is designed to assist organizations in efficiently managing and enhancing their API lifecycle. This release caters to the increasing need for API-oriented solutions in the market.

news.headline: Garanti BBVA partners with Ripple and IBM to bolster digital platform security; launching crypto trading service post successful 2023 pilot for its entire customer base.
news.summary: In Istanbul, Garanti BBVA Kripto has partnered with Ripple and IBM to establish a secure environment for its crypto asset trading platform. After a successful trial run in 2023, the bank is now introducing the service to all its customers, utilizing technological partnerships to maintain top-notch performance, security, and customer confidence. Through the joint offering by Ripple Custody and IBM, the bank was able to securely develop, implement, and oversee the institutional-grade solution.

news.headline: Bioptimus partners with Proscia to integrate H-optimus-0 AI model into Concentriq® Embeddings for faster breakthroughs in pathology/life sciences.
news.summary: A French startup, Bioptimus, has successfully integrated its leading H-optimus-0 foundation model into Proscia’s Concentriq® Embeddings platform. This collaboration aims to empower data scientists and researchers in pathology and life sciences by providing access to advanced AI capabilities for accelerating breakthroughs in their work. The integration of H-optimus-0 into the platform expands the range of foundation models available to users, facilitating AI development at a remarkable pace and scale. The promising partnership between Bioptimus and Proscia signifies a significant advancement in leveraging AI technology within the field.

news.headline: Xurrent™ rebrands from 4me, a SaaS vendor expanding in UK & Ireland with cutting-edge service management solutions.
news.summary: Santa Barbara, California - Xurrent™, a prominent SaaS-based service management software platform, recently revealed a major rebrand from 4me™. This transformation is aimed at enhancing the company's presence in the UK and Ireland to provide advanced service management solutions to partners and customers. Xurrent delivers a user-friendly, extensively automated platform that assists IT teams and managed service providers (MSPs) in their operations. The company's strategic shift towards a broader market is evident in its commitment to innovation and empowering local stakeholders with efficient solutions.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart (Strongest to Weakest): USD, CAD, EUR, GBP, NZD, AUD, CHF, JPY
General Silicones introduces Compo-SiL®, a silicone-based solution for membrane keypads, showcasing at MEDICA and Electronica.
news.summary: An expert in silicones is leading the way in utilizing silicone in membrane keypads, showcasing their innovative silicone-based solution at MEDICA and Electronica to highlight improved sustainability and enhanced product designs. The company, General Silicones, based in Hsinchu, will be demonstrating this unique application at the events on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Trainocate acquires EnterOne for advanced tech training, specializing in Cisco, VMware, AWS, Microsoft. Strengthening partnership.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Trainocate, a prominent IT education provider based in Reston, Virginia, revealed its acquisition of EnterOne. EnterOne is known for its expertise in advanced technology training and services, with a focus on Cisco, VMware, AWS, and Microsoft. This acquisition marks a significant move by Trainocate to enhance its offerings in the IT sector.

news.headline: Mammut, Klimate, ARC, Bofort, & Carbonaide partner for CO2 removal, storage in concrete, a groundbreaking initiative.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in SEON, Switzerland and COPENHAGEN, Denmark, a pioneering partnership was announced by Mammut, Klimate, ARC, Bofort, and Carbonaide. This innovative project aims at removing carbon dioxide (CO2) and storing it in concrete. This initiative represents a major advancement in the realm of combating climate change and promoting sustainability.

news.headline: ATR partners with Syncron for AI-driven inventory management, enhancing service capabilities. - Oct. 23, 2024
news.summary: A prominent regional aircraft manufacturer is enhancing its service capabilities through the integration of artificial intelligence for improved efficiency and predictive analytics. The announcement was made by Syncron on October 23, 2024 in Stockholm. ATR, known as the world's top regional aircraft company, will be benefitting from these advancements. This move is expected to streamline operations and enhance the overall service lifecycle management of the company.

news.headline: Jackery celebrates 12th anniversary, introduces 'Jackery Solar Generator Standard,' sets industry benchmarks. #innovation
news.summary: In London on October 23, 2024, Jackery, a company at the forefront of sustainable energy solutions, marked its 12th year. Established in California back in 2012, Jackery has experienced significant expansion and is now recognized worldwide as a top brand. The company is renowned for its environmentally friendly and inventive products, with a focus on...

news.headline: Verkkokauppa.com completes change negotiations to improve operational efficiency and renew organization.
news.summary: Negotiations on the restructuring of Verkkokauppa.com have been finalized, aimed at enhancing operational efficiency. The reorganization process is expected to result in a reduction of X number of employees, impacting various departments within the company. The decision comes as part of the company's strategy to adapt to evolving market demands and streamline its operations. Verkkokauppa.com is optimistic that these changes will lead to improved performance and overall success in the future.

news.headline: Nxera Pharma wins Biotech Co. of the Year and Financing Deal of the Year at Citeline Japan Awards 2024 in Tokyo.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Japan and Cambridge, UK, on 23 October 2024, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. (TSE 4565), previously recognized as Sosei Group or Sosei Heptares, proudly secured the titles of Biotech Company of the Year and Financing Deal of the Year at the Citeline Japan Awards 2024 in Tokyo.

news.headline: NXP’s Trimension UWB technology powers Audi’s new platform for precise real-time localization.
news.summary: The Trimension NCJ29Dx family from NXP serves as the technological basis for Audi’s latest UWB platform, offering accurate and secure real-time localization capabilities.

news.headline: GXO boosts Beauty Pie with 4M beauty products distributed in UK, facilitating growth in luxury retail.
news.summary: The UK-based company GXO has successfully delivered nearly 4 million makeup and skincare products to customers of Beauty Pie.
